name: chatgpt-pro-browser
description: Use your logged-in ChatGPT (incl. Pro) from the terminal by driving the real Chrome browser. Ships two skills: chatgpt-pro-browser (call Pro / upload files / multi-turn) and chatgpt-pro-planner (generate executable dev/test/refactor/bugfix plans via Pro, in superpowers markdown format for any agent CLI).

interface.shortDescription: Drive your logged-in ChatGPT Pro from the terminal; generate executable plans.
interface.longDescription: Decrypt Chrome cookies, inject into a real Chrome, and operate chatgpt.com. Includes a planner skill that produces dev/test/refactor/bugfix plans in the superpowers markdown format any agent CLI can execute.
defaultPrompt: 用我的 ChatGPT Pro 做个开发计划
plan a refactor with chatgpt pro
